per_citation.note: ID resolves to Bonfanti et al. 'From Threat Intelligence to Firewall Rules: Semantic Relations in Hybrid AI Agent and Expert System Architectures' — NOT the cited 'Semantic Firewalls with Online Ensemble Learning for Secure Agentic RAG Systems'. Cited 3x; anchors a related-work table row. Characterizations (type-safe closed vocabulary / abstractive protocol transformer / online ensemble) unsupported by the actual paper.

Source resolves, title exact. But §4 mapping table control IDs C3.6.1/C3.4.1/C6.3.1/C2.5.1 absent from HAARF; C3.2.1/C3.2.3 appear only in red-team scenario prose without formal definition. Caveat: verifier may lack appendix access; a HAARF co-author may be able to reconcile.

claim_verdicts.grounding: card lists 12 training datasets; deepset/prompt-injections not among them

per_citation.note: two-LLM privileged/quarantined = Dual-LLM (Willison) pattern CaMeL extends; CaMeL's actual contribution is a capability-tracking interpreter.
jailbreak rail in 2023 paper; self-check + Presidio PII rails are later library features, not in the cited paper.
'exploit model internals' reads adversarial; method observes attention (white-box) — accurate but could soften to 'use/inspect'.
all 3 conjuncts SUPPORTED: tool-boundary firewalls (Minimizer/Sanitizer), benchmarks easily saturated, 3-stage cascade attack.
PromptGuard 2 + AlignmentCheck + CodeShield all confirmed as components.
HTTP 403 bot-block on a well-known real page; 18-identifier Safe Harbor is established.

uncited_tools.name: qualifire Sentinel
uncited_tools.note: headline baseline (F1 0.98), no bib entry; HF card qualifire/prompt-injection-sentinel is live — add it.

uncited_tools.name: Microsoft Presidio
uncited_tools.note: invoked 5x (PHI engine in NeMo baseline; implicit PHI-panel comparator), uncited.

reproducibility_failures_confirmed.impact: make tables/make paper crash with PermissionError on any other machine

reproducibility_failures_confirmed.evidence: find bench-out -name bench.json => 0 files; exp1/exp2/healthcare dirs absent
reproducibility_failures_confirmed.impact: §3.1 detection matrix + accuracy-CI + de-obf + HealthBench tables not regenerable; refutes 'everything regenerates from make paper'

reproducibility_failures_confirmed.evidence: grep '- id:' rules/ => 141 total / 107 excl bench+e7; paper says 106/113

archetypes.name: methods-skeptic
archetypes.headline: Headline 0.40-vs-0.83 is apples-to-oranges; paper's own §7 bare-judge (R 0.82/F1 0.90) ties the scaffold, undercutting the abstract framing. Needs scaffold-vs-bare-judge isolation, additive ablation, human-labeled gold set, matched-FPR baselines, deployed-point adaptive results, clean latency.

archetypes.name: related-work-hawk
archetypes.headline: Related-work scaffolding unsound: wrong-source (C1), invented HAARF IDs (C2), unsupported protectai-training claim (C3), CaMeL mischar (C4); missing must-cite prior art: Dual-LLM/Willison, StruQ, Jatmo, Spotlighting, Presidio, clinical de-id (i2b2/n2c2, Philter).

archetypes.name: reproducibility-critic
archetypes.headline: Artifact substrate strong (scripts, corpora, dataset card, spec docs all exist) but 'regenerates from make paper' false as committed (hardcoded path + missing bench.json); gated/unpinned baselines; seed 42 vs 1337. All fixes mechanical.

action_list.description: Fix wrong-source semanticfirewall2026 (arXiv:2603.03911 is the wrong paper); re-verify or drop the related-work row.
Rebuild §4 HAARF control-ID mapping against real HAARF IDs, or recast as authors' operationalization.
§6.2: substantiate or remove 'protectai-DeBERTa trained on deepset'.
De-hardcode make_tables.py:9 and commit headline bench.json (or offline regenerator) so make paper runs on clean checkout.
Isolate scaffold from model (combined chain vs bare judge, all axes); rewrite abstract/title to claim only what survives.
Leave-one-component-out additive ablation on HealthBench with CIs + McNemar.
Human-labeled gold HealthBench subset (IAA); FPR on non-scope-filtered benign; anchor §3.8-3.9.
Matched-FPR baseline comparison; deployed-point adaptive results as co-headline with strict-chain 100%.
Add Dual-LLM/Willison, StruQ, Jatmo, Spotlighting/Hines, Presidio, clinical de-id (i2b2/n2c2, Philter); cite Sentinel; soften CaMeL + NeMo.
Reconcile seed 42/1337, rule counts 106/113/141, pin Ollama digests, dump gated-baseline predictions, fix duplicate section numbers, use-or-remove deberta2021.
